description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a predominantly black metal body and a wooden pistol grip. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal, featuring a tubular folding stock that runs along the top of the weapon. The magazine is curved and detachable, likely designed for rapid reloading. The front and rear iron sights are integrated into the upper assembly, providing basic aiming functionality. The wooden grip is ergonomically shaped with vertical grooves for improved handling, contrasting with the otherwise utilitarian metal construction. The overall design suggests a weapon optimized for close-quarters use, typical of urban environments.
description: A compact, black metal rifle with a wooden pistol grip, folding stock, and curved detachable magazine, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden grip, folding stock, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, wooden grip, and the folding stock from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden grip, rear sight, and the alignment of the folding stock.
